objective: Refactor authentication module from legacy session cookies to JWT-based token validation with refresh-token rotation
state: Phase 3 of 5 in progress: implementing refresh-token rotation
JWT signing config (RS256) complete and tested
Redis integration for token TTL operational
decisions: RS256 for JWT signing — enables stateless downstream verification
Redis for refresh-token storage — atomic TTL expiration, O(1) revocation
Legacy cookie endpoint behind feature flag for gradual rollout
constraints: Migration must be non-blocking — 2.3M active session rows in legacy table
Three downstream services depend on cookie auth headers — coordinated update required
Hard cap of 4k tokens for memory surface
blockers: Redis cluster failover behavior under token-burst load not yet tested
OpenAPI spec for /auth/token endpoint pending API review
nextActions: Write integration tests for refresh-token rotation edge cases
Coordinate with payments-service team on auth header migration
Draft OpenAPI spec for /auth/token and submit for review
